# technitium_dhcp_scopes (Data Source)

Lists all DHCP scopes on the Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_dhcp_scopes" "all" {}

output "scope_names" {
  value = data.technitium_dhcp_scopes.all.scopes[*].name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `scopes` (Attributes List) List of DHCP scopes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scopes))

<a id="nestedatt--scopes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes`

Read-Only:

- `broadcast_address` (String) The broadcast address of the scope.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the DHCP scope is enabled.
- `ending_address` (String) The ending IP address of the DHCP range.
- `name` (String) The name of the DHCP scope.
- `network_address` (String) The network address of the scope.
- `starting_address` (String) The starting IP address of the DHCP range.
- `subnet_mask` (String) The subnet mask for the scope.
